titleStmt.title: SII 15.215: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 215. (B.K. No. 153 of 1926-27.) BENTŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two faces of a pillar in the temple of Śambhuliṅga.

The record contains three dates. The first is dated the 9th regnal year of the king, Siddhārthi, Āshāḍha ba. 14, Friday. There was an Adhika-Āshāḍha month in the year; but as there is no specific mention of it, the reference may be to Nija-Āshādha in which case the datails of the date correspond to 1199 A.D., July 9. The weekday, however, was Thursday. The second date is of the same year, Pushya śu. 8, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1199 A.D., December 26. The last date is the cyclic year Raudri, Śrāvaṇa-pāḍiva, Thursday. Obviously the cyclic year is the following one when the details correspond to 1200 A.D. July 13.
It records a series of gifts made to the god Svayambhudēva of Benatūru by several individuals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© hoysaṇacakravartti vīrabaḷlāḷadēva variṣarda neya siddhā
rtthi saṁvatsarada Āsāḍha bahuḷa 14 śu . byatī
pāta puṇyadinadalu banatūra svayaṁbhu
dēvara nivēdyaṁ baḍḍiyalahaṁtāgi Aṇnigeṟe
ya jaṁguḷiya bāgaṇa biṭṭa gadyāṇa 2 ©
talliga kasapaṇa biṭṭa gadyāṇa 2 Ī dharmmamaṁ kō
ḷivāḍadiṁnūrvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru � ©
© mattaṁ puṣya suddha 8 Ādivāraduttarāya
ṇa saṁkramaṇa puṇya tithiyoḷu gōḷiya
ra hōcavvege śra(śrē)yavahantāgi Āyakkana makka
ḷu gauḷiya māraṇa biṭṭa haṇavaydu dōcaṇa
haṇaveydu kēsiyaṇa gadyāṇa [Oṁ]du dōraṇa
gadyāṇa Oṁdu Amitrayya paṇavaydu mallaṇa
gadyāṇa Oṁdu . mattaṁ vaṇnigeṟeya Ayvattokka
lu gadyāṇa Oṁdu . gōṣṭi paṇavaydu Antu
hoṁge hāga vriddhiyalu hattu hoṁna
baḍḍiyalā dēvara nivēdyamaṁ dharmmarāśi naḍa
suvaru . Ī dharmmamaṁ kōḷivāḍadiṁnūrvvaru
kēsavagēriya sāsirvvaruṁ pratipāḷi
suvaru .

© mattaṁ raudri saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa sudda pāḍiva bri
haspativāra vyatīpātadaṁdu gōḷiya kēsiya
ṇaṁ dēvargge sōmavāradalu hālumaṁḍegeya nivēdya
kā vriddhiyalu koṭṭa haṇavaydu mattaṁ heḍagiya kēma
yanāyakaṁ hālumaṁḍageya naḍasuvadakke koṭṭa ha
ṇavaydu . kabbaḷagētanuṁ koṭṭa gadyāṇa Oṁdu jirige hollaṇaṁ
koṭṭa gadyāṇa Oṁdu . Eraguppaya bolleya maileya
nāyaka dhūpava naḍasuvudakke koṭṭa gadyāṇa Oṁdu . svayaṁbhu
dēvargge Ā gōḷiya bāgaṇanu telliga kasavaṇanaṁtirvva
ruṁ kūḍi koṭṭa pariyāḷada phala mūvattu jēghaṁṭeya pha
la mūvattu ghaṁṭeya phala maṁvattumūṟu dhūpa guṁṭe
ya phala Eṁṭu yā ya phala Eṁṭu mattaṁ jīrage ho
llaṇa koṭṭa gadyāṇa [Oṁ]du gaṇapa koṭṭa gadyāṇa yeraḍu . mattaṁ hō
caveya putra gōḷiya kēsiyaṇa sōmavāradalu hālumaṁḍa
geya nivēdyavanā vriddhiyalu naḍavantāgi koṭṭa gadyāṇa Oṁdu kasa
piseṭṭiya bhāvaṁ saṁbhuseṭṭi dēvargge nitya dēvara nivē
dyada tuppavanā vriddhiyalu naḍevantāgi kū
ṭṭa gadyāṇa Oṁdu . kōḷivāḍada nāraṇa ballaṇa
ta(tu)ppake koṭṭa haṇavaydu . tuppakke mācaṇa
koṭṭa haṇavaydu . niruguṁdada talliga kīrtise
ṭṭiya maga bācaṇa naṁdādīvige naḍevudakke gadyāṇa
Oṁdu gōṣṭiyāgi koṭṭa haṇavaydu .
Digital edition of SII 15.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
